task_summary: Panel cohort cell: p1_compliance asks composer to build the transform_pipeline pipeline shape. Generated from panel-broad-2026-05-09.yaml on the panel-broad cohort.
opening_prompt:
I need to set up a workflow to process a CSV file of transaction data that's come to us from an external system, and I'm running into some data quality issues that need to be cleaned up before we can use it for controls testing.

Here's the situation: the file has pricing and inventory fields, but they're coming in as text strings rather than numbers, which is making it difficult to work with. We also need to compute a few derived fields — specifically, a line total (price times quantity), a discounted price at ten percent off, and then a discounted total. Depending on how messy the source data is, we may encounter entries that don't convert cleanly, and those need to be separated out into a quarantine file so our second-line review team can examine them before we proceed.

What I'm really after is a clean, enriched output file with all the calculations done and ready to go, plus a separate evidentiary record of anything that didn't pass through — partly for our audit trail, but also so we have documentation of what we excluded and why. Could we set this up so that the good entries go to one place and the problem entries go somewhere else, and we keep a record of the whole process?

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Lower-case substring match against final assistant content. The skill (anti-passivity section) explicitly forbids these phrases — any hit is RED. Standard list shared with the convergence suite.
red_criteria.build_failure_note: These strings are server-injected by service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message() when the model declares completion but the pipeline fails preflight. Their presence is definitive evidence the model failed to converge.
